step_rationale: Vitamin K2 co-factor; pleiotropic vascular effects off main atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Menaquinone supports matrix Gla protein carboxylation and vascular calcification regulation, acting through pathways parallel to atherothrombosis.

references.title: Gut CommensalPromote Atherothrombosis via Regulating L-Tryptophan Metabolism.
